rawFiles.name: outputs/universities/wikidata-candidates.json
rawFiles.notes: Local automation candidate output retained in data-automation.

rawFiles.name: outputs/universities/seed-review-gaps.json
rawFiles.notes: Local held-candidate review artifact retained in data-automation.

rawFiles.name: outputs/universities/source-comparison-report.json
rawFiles.notes: Reviewed comparison artifact used to confirm these candidates were held out of the seed export.

transforms: Selected Wikidata-only candidates with reviewed English labels and no current duplicate hit.
Deferred sy-al-shahbaa-university for duplicate/enrichment review against the existing Al-Shahba University record.
Deferred Wikidata Q114672251 and Q28715211 because they need source-backed English names before canonical import.
Set institutionType to other because Wikidata did not provide a canonical public/private classification matching this schema.
Kept websites null where Wikidata did not provide an official website.
Kept location null where Wikidata did not provide source-backed location fields in the local candidate output.
reviewNotes: Fifth candidate-record batch import. The records remain sourced to approved Wikidata data with CC0 attribution retained through the source registry.
